title: Y@berekyahuw #3000
definition:
Jeberechiah = "Jehovah blesses"

 1) father of a Zechariah, in the reign of Ahaz and time of Isaiah
nasbUsage:
Definition: Jeberechiah = "Jehovah blesses"

 1) father of a Zechariah, in the reign of Ahaz and time of Isaiah

    NASB:  Yah blesses, the name of several Isr.
